/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdeadwheel_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libdeadwheel_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/deadwheel_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/deadwheel_msgs/msg/detail/deadwheel_ticks__description.c.o CMakeFiles/deadwheel_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/deadwheel_msgs/msg/detail/deadwheel_ticks__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/deadwheel_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/deadwheel_msgs/msg/detail/deadwheel_ticks__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
